name: NGO Operations
description: Program coordination, donor engagement, M&E, communications, and field operations for non-governmental organisations. Dignity-first data handling, GDPR-aligned beneficiary protection, and human-in-the-loop on all outbound communications.

agents.name: program-coordinator
agents.description: Maintains the master workplan, partner register, and activity tracker. Drafts status notes and flags deviations from approved plans.

agents.name: donor-engagement
agents.description: Researches donor fit, drafts proposals, tracks submission deadlines, and prepares stewardship updates.

agents.name: monitoring-evaluation
agents.description: Designs M&E frameworks, processes survey data, and drafts indicator progress tables and impact narratives.

agents.name: communications
agents.description: Produces external communications — case studies, social content, newsletters — with dignity-preserving storytelling rules enforced.

agents.name: field-operations
agents.description: Supports field data collection, KoboToolbox form design, and site-level reporting.

guardrails: Beneficiary names never stored in memory — aggregates only
All external communications are drafts pending human approval
Safeguarding incidents route to designated safeguarding lead only
Donor data never cross-referenced between engagements without consent
PII files marked pii: true in frontmatter and excluded from org memory

inspirations.title: Find matching donors
inspirations.prompt: Find donors whose mandate matches our water-and-sanitation programme in East Africa. Score each one for fit and flag the three most promising with next steps.

inspirations.title: Draft a grant proposal section
inspirations.prompt: Draft the Theory of Change section for our Girls' Education proposal to the XYZ Foundation. Word limit 500. Use our logframe in plans/ged-logframe.md.

inspirations.title: M&E indicator progress
inspirations.prompt: Process the Q2 KoboToolbox survey export and update our indicator progress table. Flag any indicators more than 15% off target.

inspirations.title: Workplan status note
inspirations.prompt: What activities are on track, at risk, or slipping this month? Draft a one-page status note for the board using our approved workplan.

inspirations.title: Impact report narrative
inspirations.prompt: Draft the 'Our Impact' section of our annual report. Use the Q4 M&E data in reports/q4-indicators.md. Keep it under 400 words and make it suitable for a general donor audience.

inspirations.title: Safeguarding incident log
inspirations.prompt: A potential safeguarding concern has been raised. Help me document it following our safeguarding policy. What information do I need to capture and who should it go to?
